hero_subtitle: SFTY structures wallet transaction audit logs with role-based controls to support institutional KYT risk reviews and maintain a defensible compliance trail across providers.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

problem_title: Audit trails weaken across disconnected KYT logs
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to maintain a clear, auditable record of wallet and transaction risk when KYT data and audit logs remain separated across multiple providers. This fragmentation slows risk reviews and complicates operational governance and evidence readiness for institutional due diligence.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects KYT provider data, transaction risk signals, reviewer actions and audit logs into one workflow, enabling clearer traceability and defensible evidence for institutional compliance and governance.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY captures and preserves wallet risk signals, routes alerts to review, links cases to decisions, and maintains audit evidence for governance and compliance oversight.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYT audit logs, wallet risk signals and transactional data into structured evidence and decision workflows for clearer audit and compliance review.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with controlled audit logs, preserving KYT risk evidence and provider signals within a secure, role-governed compliance deployment environment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how KYT transaction data forms audit-ready evidence
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit logs track risk review and decision history

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP compliance teams a connected control layer connecting KYT, KYC, Travel Rule, and reporting outputs into structured workflows, cases, and audit-ready evidence for scalable risk management.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY structure KYT audit workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures KYT audit workflows by aggregating wallet and transaction risk signals, linking alerts to cases, routing reviews, recording decisions and preserving evidence within operational compliance processes.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve KYT audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves KYT audit evidence through detailed case histories, decision logs, and linked provider outputs, supporting traceability across wallet risk, transaction monitoring and compliance reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, and screening providers, sitting above them to connect their outputs without replacing underlying tools or workflows.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No, SFTY does not replace KYT or Travel Rule providers; it connects and structures their data into one compliance layer for improved review, evidence and reporting.
final_title: Turn KYT audit logs into structured evidence
final_description: Review how SFTY supports role-based access and preserves audit-ready wallet transaction records for institutional KYT risk workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
